CREATE TABLE test.hits (EventDate DateTime, UserID Int32, EventType String);
SELECT replaceRegexpOne(toString(EventDate), '(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})', '\\2/\\3/\\1') AS res FROM test.hits ORDER BY EventDate LIMIT 3;
SELECT UserID, replaceRegexpOne(EventType, 'click', 'interaction') AS UpdatedEventType FROM test.hits;
SELECT DISTINCT replaceRegexpOne(toString(EventDate), '(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})', '\\3-\\2-\\1') AS ReformattedDate FROM test.hits LIMIT 5;
SELECT UserID, replaceRegexpOne(toString(EventDate), '.*?(\\d{4})-(\\d{2})-(\\d{2})', '\\0') AS FullMatch FROM test.hits;

WITH (SELECT DISTINCT UserID FROM test.hits WHERE EventDate >= '2023-10-01' AND EventDate < '2023-10-04') AS temp_users SELECT UserID, replaceRegexpOne('User ' || toString(UserID), 'User (\\d+)', 'User ID: \\1') FROM temp_users;

SELECT UserID, replaceRegexpOne(EventType, '^(click|view)$', 'user action: \\1') AS AnnotatedEventType FROM test.hits WHERE UserID IN (SELECT DISTINCT UserID FROM test.hits WHERE EventType = 'click');
SELECT EventType, replaceRegexpOne(concat(EventType, ', timestamp: ', toString(EventDate)), '(click|view)', 'Action: \\1 occurring at: ') AS DetailedEventInfo FROM test.hits;
CREATE TABLE test.users (UserID Int32, UserName String);
SELECT u.UserName, replaceRegexpOne(h.EventType, 'click', 'Click Event') AS DisplayEventType FROM test.users u JOIN test.hits h ON u.UserID = h.UserID WHERE u.UserID IS NOT NULL;
